ledger.method: sympy symbolic identity: Prod(c*x_i)^w_i / (c*Prod x_i^w_i) simplifies to 1 (n=3, sum w_i=1)
sympy: (a+b)/2 - sqrt(ab) == (sqrt a - sqrt b)^2/2 >= 0  (GM<=AM, so GM<=max)
sympy exact arithmetic: Singleton n-k+1=5, erasure budget n-k=4 for RS(10,6)
sympy: V-E+F==2 verified on all 5 Platonic solids (Euler characteristic)
sympy exact rationals: 1/2+1/4+...+1/64 == 63/64 (Horus-Eye)
sympy exact rationals: sum 2^-l == 1 <= 1 for prefix lengths {1,2,3,3}
sympy: partition entropy additive s_total=s1+s2 and monotone s1<=s1+s2 (s2>=0)
sympy: linear superposition p_total == sum_i p_i over k=4 phases (additive fragment only)
sympy expand: x^2+bx+c == (x+b/2)^2 + (c-b^2/4)
sympy Lagrange identity: (Sa^2)(Sb^2)-(Sab)^2 == (a1b2-a2b1)^2 >= 0
sympy: Taylor of atan(x) matches Madhava-Leibniz series to order 12
sympy: d_FR(p,p)=2*arccos(sum p_i)=2*arccos(1)=0 (exact self-distance)
sympy: n=3f+1=4, quorum=2f+1=3, 2*quorum>n+f (arithmetic only; safety=Conjecture-2)
sympy/int: [[9,1,3]] corrects t=floor((d-1)/2)=1; classical Singleton n-k+1=9>=d
numeric sampling (NOT a symbolic proof): KL>=2*TV^2 held on 20000/20000 random 2-pt distributions
sympy.physics.units: R*E/(hbar*c) has Dimension energy*length/(action*velocity) == dimensionless (Bekenstein S is a pure number)
sympy.physics.units: k_B*T has Dimension(energy) == Joule dimension — Landauer bit-erasure cost
sympy.physics.units: trust axes are ratios in [0,1] (dimensionless); weighted geo-mean of dimensionless axes stays dimensionless
